title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know what kind of wild animals you guys are, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't RAM into my ship!! Got it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah, now I remember what happened!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....we finished climbing the waterfall with the ship, and then we saw land.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But then we suddenly got caught in a whirlpool that was right in front of us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold on to me!! I'll fly us over to land!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wait a minute, Sanji! Take us, too...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No way. You guys are too heavy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You can jump on my stomach, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right! I'm gonna make my escape too, sunny!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is your deal...? You're being a nuisance to the end....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This is where I ended up, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Am I at the top of the waterfall? Or did I fall down?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Did I actually make it to Wano...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh well! Nothing I can do about it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Please forgive me!! Please let me go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And please give me back my rice!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're an attendant of the evil Kouzuki clan...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is an unforgivable crime. Should we sell you in the red-light district... or should we turn you in!? Either way, we won't show you any mercy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut your mouth. We're on a mission right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Look! There's a ship on the beach!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He still hasn't been able to take care of that Komanu*!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His reputation as our prided guard will be furnished at this rate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ah!! this must be where KOMA-CCHiyO went...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A ship has entered the country illegally!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll put him to sleep with this tranquiliser and bring him back with us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'll be a good addition to the work force.

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 56 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
